knowledge_base.expansion_note: Round-3 expansion: gas, EV, hospital, school, hotel, data center.

rules.title: Fire extinguisher accessibility
rules.text: Fire extinguishers shall be placed at obvious and accessible positions, and must not be blocked by objects.

rules.title: Evacuation route clearance
rules.text: Evacuation routes and exits shall be kept unobstructed and shall not be occupied by goods or equipment.

rules.title: Emergency signage visibility
rules.text: Emergency evacuation signs shall be continuously visible and shall not be covered or damaged.

rules.title: Extinguisher maintenance status
rules.text: Portable extinguishers shall be maintained in valid status; pressure indicator and service period shall meet requirements.

rules.title: Electrical fire prevention
rules.text: Electrical wiring shall be installed and used in compliance with safety requirements to prevent overheating and short circuits.

rules.source: 安全用电管理要点(工业/工地)
rules.title: Dedicated switch box per equipment
rules.text: 严禁用同一个开关箱直接控制2台及2台以上的用电设备。

rules.title: Combustible storage management
rules.text: Combustible materials shall be managed by zoning and shall be kept away from ignition and heating sources.

rules.title: Sprinkler nozzle condition
rules.text: Automatic sprinkler nozzles shall not be blocked, painted, or damaged, and shall remain effective for discharge.

rules.title: Fire door closing state
rules.text: Normally closed fire doors shall be kept closed, and self-closing devices shall remain functional.

rules.title: Fire hydrant accessibility
rules.text: Indoor fire hydrants shall be clearly marked and shall not be blocked or occupied.

rules.title: Alarm equipment availability
rules.text: Fire alarm systems shall be maintained in normal working status and inspected regularly.

rules.title: Public venue opening fire safety check
rules.text: Public gathering venues must pass fire safety inspection before operation.

rules.title: Unit fire safety responsibilities
rules.text: Organizations must perform patrol, inspection, hazard rectification and facility maintenance.

rules.title: No blocking evacuation exits and fire lanes
rules.text: It is prohibited to occupy or block evacuation routes, exits or fire access lanes.

rules.title: Fire facility maintenance obligation
rules.text: Fire protection facilities must be maintained and faults shall be repaired promptly.

rules.title: No gas cylinders in high-rise indoor areas
rules.text: Improper indoor storage of LPG cylinders in high-rise buildings is prohibited.

rules.title: No hazardous goods storage in high-rise public areas
rules.text: Hazardous and flammable goods shall not be stored in unauthorized high-rise areas.

rules.title: No combustibles in cable shafts
rules.text: Cable shafts and vertical shafts must be kept free of combustible storage.

rules.title: Window barriers must not block escape and rescue
rules.text: External barriers such as window grills must not obstruct escape or rescue.

rules.title: Fire lane and rescue operation ground must be clear
rules.text: Fire lanes and rescue operation areas shall not be occupied or blocked.

rules.title: Kitchen exhaust ducts require periodic cleaning
rules.text: Kitchen exhaust ducts shall be cleaned periodically to prevent grease fire risk.

rules.title: Equipment rooms cannot be used as storage
rules.text: Control rooms and electrical rooms must not be repurposed for combustible storage.

rules.title: Fire control room staffing requirement
rules.text: Fire control rooms must maintain compliant duty staffing and certified operators.

rules.title: Daily fire patrol requirement
rules.text: Management entities shall perform daily fire patrols and keep records.

rules.title: Periodic fire inspection requirement
rules.text: Periodic fire inspections must be organized and documented.

rules.title: Hazard rectification timeline
rules.text: Detected fire hazards must be rectified promptly with accountable measures.

rules.title: No e-bike parking/charging in public evacuation areas
rules.text: Electric bicycles shall not be parked or charged in stairwells, corridors or lobbies.

rules.title: Fire safety training and education
rules.text: Organizations shall conduct regular fire safety training and education.

rules.title: Evacuation signage and floor maps
rules.text: Buildings shall provide clear evacuation signage and posted evacuation maps.

rules.title: Emergency response and evacuation plan
rules.text: A documented fire emergency and evacuation plan is required.

rules.title: Regular emergency drills required
rules.text: Regular fire and evacuation drills shall be organized and reviewed.

rules.title: Hot work requires approval and onsite supervision
rules.text: Welding and other hot work must follow permit approval and onsite fire watch.

rules.title: Penalty for refusing rectification of e-bike charging hazards
rules.text: Illegal e-bike charging in public areas that is not rectified is subject to penalties.

rules.title: Fire compartment door closing
rules.text: Class A and B fire compartment doors shall remain self-closing; door closers shall not be removed and doors shall not be wedged open.

rules.title: Stairwell smoke barrier
rules.text: Pressurized stairwells shall maintain positive pressure; doors shall be kept closed and pressure relief vents kept clear.

rules.title: Evacuation stair clearance
rules.text: Evacuation stairs shall have continuous railings and the clear width shall not be reduced by stored items, advertising boards, or temporary partitions.

rules.title: Refuge story features
rules.text: Refuge stories of high-rise buildings shall not be occupied by storage, offices, or residential use, and access shall remain unblocked.

rules.title: Exit door direction and locking
rules.text: Public building exit doors shall open in the direction of evacuation flow and shall not be locked, chained, or fitted with single-direction latches during use.

rules.title: Insulation material combustibility
rules.text: Combustible insulation materials on exterior walls shall meet the building height and fire-rating requirements; B3 grade materials shall not be used on populated buildings.

rules.title: Fire access road clearance
rules.text: The clear width of fire access roads shall be at least 4.0 m and the clear height at least 4.0 m; vehicles, plants, or structures shall not encroach on this clearance.

rules.title: Fire access turning area
rules.text: Dead-end fire access roads shall provide a turning area not smaller than 12 m x 12 m, kept clear of any objects.

rules.title: Fire pump room availability
rules.text: Fire pump rooms shall be unobstructed; valves on supply pipelines shall be in the normally-open position with clear status indication and tags.

rules.title: Fire water tank capacity
rules.text: Rooftop fire water tanks shall be filled to the design level; no other materials may be stored in the water tank room.

rules.title: Outdoor hydrant access
rules.text: Outdoor fire hydrants shall be installed at agreed spacing along fire access roads, and access within 1.5 m around them must remain clear.

rules.title: Indoor hydrant cabinet
rules.text: Indoor fire hydrant cabinets shall be unlocked or have visible glass-break openers; hoses, nozzles, and valves shall be intact and not removed for other use.

rules.title: Sprinkler installation scope
rules.text: Buildings exceeding the prescribed scale shall install automatic sprinkler systems covering all required spaces; partial omission for cost reasons is not permitted.

rules.title: Smoke detection installation
rules.text: Smoke detectors shall be installed where required by the design; spacing and ceiling clearance shall meet code, and detectors must not be removed or covered.

rules.title: Manual call point reachability
rules.text: Manual fire call points shall be installed at evacuation routes within 30 m walking distance and shall not be obscured by decoration, posters, or equipment.

rules.title: Heating room safety
rules.text: Boiler rooms and heating equipment rooms shall have independent ventilation, and combustible materials shall not be stored within.

rules.title: Generator room separation
rules.text: Backup diesel generator rooms shall be separated from other rooms by Class A fire walls, and day-tank fuel volume shall meet code limits.

rules.title: Cooking source separation
rules.text: Commercial cooking facilities shall be separated from residential or public use spaces by Class B fire walls and have independent exhaust ducts.

rules.title: Mass-gathering venue exits
rules.text: Public assembly venues shall provide at least two exits, with total exit width sized for the maximum occupancy and equipped with directional signage.

rules.title: Extinguisher protection radius
rules.text: For Class A hazards of medium severity, the maximum walking distance from any point to the nearest extinguisher shall not exceed 20 m.

rules.title: Minimum extinguisher count per box
rules.text: Each extinguisher placement point shall hold at least two units; a single unit at a point is not compliant for Class A or B hazard areas.

rules.title: Extinguisher mounting height
rules.text: Hand-held extinguishers shall be mounted with the top no higher than 1.5 m and the bottom no lower than 0.08 m above the floor.

rules.title: Extinguisher visible signage
rules.text: Extinguisher locations shall be marked with conspicuous signs; signs shall not be obscured by decoration, posters, or stored items.

rules.title: Sprinkler clearance
rules.text: Stored items shall be at least 0.45 m below sprinkler heads to ensure spray pattern coverage; closer placement is treated as obstruction.

rules.title: Sprinkler valve open status
rules.text: Main control valves of sprinkler systems shall be normally open with monitored signals; closing for maintenance requires explicit work permits and immediate restoration.

rules.title: Sprinkler pressure check
rules.text: Operational pressure of automatic sprinkler systems shall be within design range; pressure gauges shall be checked at least monthly and recorded.

rules.title: Fire control room staffing
rules.text: Fire control rooms shall be staffed 24 hours by at least two trained operators per shift, holding valid certificates.

rules.title: Fire control room logbook
rules.text: Fire control rooms shall keep duty logs, fault logs, and signal logs; faults shall be acknowledged and rectified within 24 hours.

rules.title: Detector spacing in flat ceiling
rules.text: Point smoke detectors on flat ceilings shall not exceed the maximum protection radius and shall not be installed within 0.5 m of walls or partitions.

rules.title: Linkage of evacuation broadcast
rules.text: Emergency broadcast and evacuation lighting shall be linked to fire alarm signals; linkage logic shall be tested at least once per year.

rules.title: Annual full system test
rules.text: Fire alarm systems shall undergo a full functional test at least once per year; results shall be archived for three years.

rules.title: Mechanical exhaust capacity
rules.text: Mechanical smoke exhaust systems shall meet the design air flow; permanent reductions in capacity due to obstructions or fan failure shall be rectified.

rules.title: Smoke vent inspection
rules.text: Smoke vents and dampers shall be inspected at least quarterly; dust accumulation, paint over, or sealing shall be removed promptly.

rules.title: Pressurized air-supply integrity
rules.text: Pressurized air-supply ducts and equipment shall remain intact; modifications affecting air-tightness require formal approval and re-testing.

rules.title: Decoration combustibility limits
rules.text: Interior ceiling materials of public spaces shall meet at least Class A combustibility, and wall materials shall meet at least Class B1; lower grades require special approval.

rules.title: Curtain combustibility
rules.text: Curtains, drapes, and fabric partitions in public spaces shall be made of fire-retardant material; untreated combustible fabric shall not be installed.

rules.title: Control room independence
rules.text: Fire control rooms shall be enclosed with Class A walls and Class A doors; storage of unrelated equipment or materials inside is prohibited.

rules.title: Control room equipment list
rules.text: Fire control rooms shall provide alarm controllers, linkage controllers, graphic display units, recording devices, and communication links to fire dispatch centers.

rules.title: Operator certification
rules.text: Fire control room operators shall hold valid building fire facility operator certificates issued under national vocational standards.

rules.title: Extinguisher service interval
rules.text: Dry-powder extinguishers shall be sent for full inspection at most every 5 years; CO2 extinguishers at most every 5 years; service tags shall be attached after maintenance.

rules.title: Extinguisher pressure indicator
rules.text: Extinguishers with pressure indicators showing red or yellow zone or with damaged seals shall be removed from service immediately and sent for repair.

rules.title: Service-tag information
rules.text: Each serviced extinguisher shall carry a tag stating service date, next service date, and service company; tags missing or illegible disqualify the unit from service.

rules.title: TN-S system requirement
rules.text: Construction-site temporary electricity shall use the TN-S three-phase five-wire system with dedicated PE conductor; mixing TT and TN systems is not permitted.

rules.title: Three-tier protection
rules.text: Construction-site distribution shall follow three-tier configuration (main, sub, terminal box) with each tier protected by a residual-current device meeting code.

rules.title: Distribution box conditions
rules.text: Distribution boxes shall be locked, labeled, and dry; one-box-multiple-equipment use, doors left open, or boxes exposed to rain are not compliant.

rules.title: Cable burying / suspension
rules.text: Outdoor temporary cables shall be buried, suspended, or routed in trays with safe height clearance; laying directly on the ground or across roads without protection is prohibited.

rules.title: Welding hot-work approval
rules.text: Welding, cutting, and other hot work on construction sites require approved hot-work permits; on-site fire watchers and extinguishers shall be assigned.

rules.title: Public assembly daily duties
rules.text: Public assembly venues shall conduct daily fire safety patrols and keep records; absence of records is treated as patrol missing.

rules.title: Shared use building coordination
rules.text: In buildings shared by multiple users, the property manager is responsible for shared evacuation routes, hydrants, and fire facilities.

rules.title: Manufacturing site separation
rules.text: Production facilities, warehouses, residential and dormitory functions shall be physically separated; mixed use within one fire compartment is prohibited.

rules.title: No occupation of fire lanes
rules.text: Fire lanes shall not be occupied, blocked, or closed off; persistent illegal parking is subject to penalty under the Fire Law.

rules.title: Mass-gathering crowd duty
rules.text: Mass gatherings shall undergo fire safety review with crowd capacity, exit count, evacuation plan, and on-site duty arrangement.

rules.title: Penalty for hazard non-rectification
rules.text: Failure to rectify ordered hazards within the deadline may incur fines, business suspension, or other administrative penalties under the Fire Law.

rules.title: Annual electrical inspection
rules.text: High-rise buildings shall conduct an annual electrical fire safety inspection; aged wiring, overloaded sockets, and improper additions shall be repaired.

rules.title: Property fire facility maintenance
rules.text: Property managers shall sign maintenance contracts for fire facilities and retain inspection records for at least three years.

rules.title: Decoration permit
rules.text: Decoration that may affect fire compartments, evacuation, or fixed fire facilities requires fire safety review and approval.

rules.title: Lobby furniture limits
rules.text: Building lobbies and shared corridors shall not be used to store furniture or non-essential items that reduce the evacuation width.

rules.title: E-bike charging station design
rules.text: Residential complexes shall set up centralized charging stations for electric bicycles, separated from main buildings with overcurrent and short-circuit protection.

rules.title: Owner education
rules.text: Property managers and owners' committees shall organize fire safety education for residents at least twice per year.

rules.title: Hazard reporting channel
rules.text: Buildings shall provide a clear hazard reporting channel for residents and employees; reported hazards shall be acknowledged within 24 hours.

rules.title: Tenant change reporting
rules.text: Changes of tenant or use type in high-rise buildings shall be reported to the fire safety responsible person and may require additional fire safety review.

rules.title: Special area handover
rules.text: Fire safety responsibility for shared facilities shall not lapse during property handover; written handover records shall be kept.

rules.title: Fire safety responsible person duties
rules.text: Fire safety responsible persons shall organize the formulation of fire safety systems, the implementation of fire safety duties, and the rectification of hazards.

rules.title: Patrol records
rules.text: Units shall conduct daily patrols of public areas, with patrol records identifying the inspector, time, and findings.

rules.title: Annual self-examination
rules.text: Units shall conduct comprehensive self-examination of fire safety at least once per year, archiving findings and rectification status.

rules.title: Hot-work registration
rules.text: Hot-work activities within unit premises shall be registered, with site protective measures and authorized supervisors named.

rules.title: Personnel training records
rules.text: Units shall arrange fire safety training for new employees and refresher training for existing employees, with attendance records preserved.

rules.title: Volunteer fire team
rules.text: Larger units shall establish volunteer fire teams, equip basic firefighting tools, and organize at least one drill per year.

rules.title: Emergency response system
rules.text: Production units shall establish an emergency response system covering early warning, response procedures, on-site command, and post-event review.

rules.title: Plan filing
rules.text: Emergency plans of high-risk units shall be filed with local emergency management authorities and reviewed at least every three years.

rules.title: Initial response duty
rules.text: Production units shall ensure first-responder presence and isolation of the incident scene; reports to the responsible authority shall be filed without delay.

rules.title: Post-event review
rules.text: After emergency incidents, units shall complete post-event reviews documenting causes, response performance, and improvement actions.

rules.title: Workshop dormitory mixed use
rules.text: Industrial workshops combined with dormitories or canteens within the same fire compartment constitute a major hazard requiring immediate rectification.

rules.title: Locked exits in production
rules.text: Locked or blocked safety exits in factory production areas during operation are classified as major fire hazards under workplace safety rules.

rules.title: Combustible dust collector position
rules.text: Dust collectors handling combustible dust shall be installed outdoors or separated; indoor placement near fire sources or non-explosion-proof equipment is a major hazard.

rules.title: Hot-work supervisor missing
rules.text: Hot work in flammable workshops without on-site supervisors and approved permits is classified as a major hazard subject to immediate suspension.

rules.title: Spray painting room ventilation
rules.text: Spray painting rooms shall have explosion-proof ventilation and exhaust systems with regular cleaning records; failure constitutes a major fire/explosion hazard.

rules.title: Dangerous chemical separation
rules.text: Dangerous chemicals incompatible by hazard category shall be stored separately; mixed storage of acid and alkali, oxidizer and combustible is prohibited.

rules.title: Storage labeling
rules.text: Each dangerous chemical container shall be labeled with chemical name, GHS warnings, and emergency contact; missing labels are non-compliant.

rules.title: Transportation safety
rules.text: Vehicles transporting dangerous chemicals shall hold valid permits, follow approved routes, and be operated by qualified drivers and escorts.

rules.title: Kitchen exhaust cleaning interval
rules.text: Commercial kitchen exhaust ducts shall be cleaned at least once every quarter; cleaning records shall be kept for at least one year.

rules.title: Kitchen extinguishing system
rules.text: Commercial kitchen exhaust hoods serving multiple stoves shall install dedicated kitchen extinguishing systems with monthly inspection.

rules.title: Centralized charging area design
rules.text: Centralized e-bike charging areas in residential or campus complexes shall be separated from main buildings by fire walls or open-air structures with monitoring.

rules.title: Battery indoor charging prohibition
rules.text: Removing the e-bike battery for indoor charging in residential dwellings is prohibited unless using an enclosed fire-resistant cabinet.

rules.source: 安全用电管理要点(工业/工地)
rules.title: Site temporary electrical practice
rules.text: Industrial and construction sites using temporary electricity shall maintain protective earthing, leakage protection, and weatherproof distribution boxes.

rules.source: 安全用电管理要点(工业/工地)
rules.title: Cable damage rectification
rules.text: Cables with damaged insulation, exposed copper, or scorched surfaces shall be replaced before continued use; tape patches are not a permanent fix.

rules.source: 安全用电管理要点(工业/工地)
rules.title: One-box-one-machine
rules.text: Construction-site terminal switch boxes shall serve a single piece of equipment; multiple machines sharing one terminal box is prohibited.

rules.source: 安全用电管理要点(工业/工地)
rules.title: Box position
rules.text: Distribution boxes shall not be placed under direct rain, in flammable storage areas, or where rescue access is blocked.

rules.source: 安全用电管理要点(工业/工地)
rules.title: Earthing test
rules.text: PE conductor and earthing resistance shall be tested at site startup and periodically; resistance exceeding 4 ohm requires immediate rectification.

rules.source: 安全用电管理要点(工业/工地)
rules.title: Welding gas-cylinder spacing
rules.text: During welding, oxygen and acetylene cylinders shall be at least 5 m apart and at least 10 m from open flame or heat source.

rules.title: Workshop fire-resistance class
rules.text: Workshops handling Class A or B production hazards shall meet at least Grade II fire resistance; lower grades require approved special design.

rules.title: Warehouse compartment area
rules.text: Warehouse fire compartments shall not exceed code-prescribed area limits; conversion of single-story to multi-story without re-zoning is non-compliant.

rules.title: Equipment-room separation
rules.text: Equipment rooms (transformer, switch, refrigeration) shall be separated from adjacent spaces by Class A fire walls; storage of unrelated combustibles inside is prohibited.

rules.title: Combustible duct lining
rules.text: Internal linings of HVAC ducts that pass through fire compartments shall use non-combustible materials.

rules.title: Open external stair
rules.text: Open external stairs used as evacuation routes shall be free of combustible cladding and shall not have wall openings within 2 m of stair flights.

rules.title: Fire-rated windows location
rules.text: Windows opening into stairwells, refuge floors, or shared shafts shall be Class C or higher fire-rated and shall not be replaced with regular glazing.

rules.title: Helipad clearance
rules.text: Helipads on super high-rise rooftops shall be kept clear of antennas, signs, or stored items that obstruct landing.

rules.title: Underground evacuation
rules.text: Underground spaces deeper than 10 m or containing 50+ persons shall provide independent evacuation routes leading directly outdoors.

rules.title: Evacuation lighting illuminance
rules.text: Floor illuminance of evacuation routes shall be at least 1 lx; refuge floors and exit corridors shall be at least 5 lx.

rules.title: Hazardous storage indoor limit
rules.text: Indoor storage of flammable liquids in workshops shall not exceed daily-usage quantity; bulk storage shall be relocated to dedicated rooms.

rules.title: Emergency lamp battery test
rules.text: Emergency lighting batteries shall undergo monthly self-test and quarterly discharge tests with results logged.

rules.title: Sign luminance
rules.text: Evacuation signs shall maintain a minimum luminance after 30 minutes of battery operation; faded or dimmed signs shall be replaced.

rules.title: Illumination installation height
rules.text: Wall-mounted evacuation signs shall be installed at 1.0 m to 1.5 m height; ceiling signs shall be visible from any position in the route.

rules.title: Acceptance test responsibility
rules.text: Fire alarm system acceptance tests shall be conducted jointly by installer, owner, and qualified third-party agency before handover.

rules.title: Periodic detector cleaning
rules.text: Smoke detectors and beam detectors shall be cleaned at least annually; dust and grease accumulation shall not be allowed.

rules.title: Linkage test record
rules.text: Linkage tests for sprinklers, smoke control, evacuation broadcast, and door release shall be performed annually with documented results.

rules.title: Sprinkler nozzle replacement
rules.text: Damaged, painted-over, or corroded sprinkler nozzles shall be replaced; on-site repainting that obstructs the heat-sensing bulb is prohibited.

rules.title: Storage area sprinkler density
rules.text: Storage areas exceeding rack height limits require enhanced sprinkler density and in-rack sprinklers; otherwise sprinkler protection is treated as inadequate.

rules.title: Metro evacuation platform
rules.text: Metro and underground transit station platforms shall maintain unobstructed evacuation aisles with width meeting peak-hour design occupancy.

rules.title: Underground assembly fire compartment
rules.text: Underground civil air defense projects used for assembly or commerce shall have fire compartments not exceeding 1000 m^2; sprinkler installation may double this limit.

rules.title: Safety sign minimum size
rules.text: Fire safety signs shall meet minimum visibility size requirements based on viewing distance; signs covered or below the minimum size are non-compliant.

rules.title: Hazard warning placement
rules.text: Hazard warning signs shall be placed near the entry to the hazard zone and shall not be hidden by stored items, doors, or movable equipment.

rules.title: Fire equipment sign visibility
rules.text: Fire equipment locations shall be marked with red-on-white international fire signs and kept visible from primary corridors.

rules.source: 高校学生宿舍消防安全管理规定
rules.title: Dormitory power outlet limit
rules.text: Each student dormitory bed area shall have at most one regulated power outlet; multi-stage power strips and unauthorized rewiring are prohibited.

rules.source: 高校学生宿舍消防安全管理规定
rules.title: Dormitory high-power appliance ban
rules.text: Use of high-power appliances such as electric stoves, heaters, and induction cookers in dormitories is prohibited; campus inspections may seize such devices.

rules.source: 高校学生宿舍消防安全管理规定
rules.title: Dormitory smoking ban
rules.text: Smoking in student dormitories and connected corridors is prohibited; unattended smoldering items are treated as serious fire hazards.

rules.source: 高校学生宿舍消防安全管理规定
rules.title: Dormitory evacuation drill
rules.text: Universities shall organize fire evacuation drills in student dormitory blocks at least once per semester with attendance recorded.

rules.source: 高校学生宿舍消防安全管理规定
rules.title: Dormitory open flame ban
rules.text: Use of candles, incense, alcohol stoves, and similar open flames in student dormitories is prohibited.

rules.source: 高校学生宿舍消防安全管理规定
rules.title: Dormitory storage limit
rules.text: Student dormitories shall not store flammable solvents, large amounts of paper or fabric, or unused appliances above safe capacity.

rules.source: 高校学生宿舍消防安全管理规定
rules.title: Common-area patrol
rules.text: Dormitory administrators shall conduct daily fire safety patrols of corridors, stairwells, and common rooms with logged inspections.

rules.source: 高校学生宿舍消防安全管理规定
rules.title: Dormitory exit door state
rules.text: Dormitory exit doors shall remain unlocked from the inside during occupancy; chains, padlocks, or wedges that block egress are prohibited.

rules.source: 消防安全责任制实施办法 (国办发[2017]87号)
rules.title: Government responsibility
rules.text: Local governments shall include fire safety in performance evaluation and ensure dedicated personnel and budget for hazard rectification.

rules.source: 消防安全责任制实施办法 (国办发[2017]87号)
rules.title: Department joint duty
rules.text: Public security, emergency management, education, and housing departments shall coordinate fire safety inspections and information sharing.

rules.source: 消防安全责任制实施办法 (国办发[2017]87号)
rules.title: Unit responsibility scope
rules.text: Each unit shall implement the fire safety responsible person system covering planning, training, drills, hazard rectification, and emergency response.

rules.source: 仓库防火安全管理规则
rules.title: Warehouse separation distance
rules.text: Warehouses shall maintain code-required separation from production buildings, residences, and ignition sources; reductions require fire safety review.

rules.source: 仓库防火安全管理规则
rules.title: Warehouse smoking ban
rules.text: Smoking, hot work, and open flame use inside warehouses are prohibited; designated smoking areas shall be located outside the warehouse.

rules.source: 仓库防火安全管理规则
rules.title: Warehouse stack height
rules.text: Stored goods shall maintain at least 0.5 m from walls, 0.3 m from ceilings, and 0.5 m from light fixtures; aisles shall be at least 1.5 m wide.

rules.source: 仓库防火安全管理规则
rules.title: Warehouse electrical operation
rules.text: Power to warehouse lighting and equipment shall be shut off at end of work day; permanent live lighting requires explosion-proof or anti-fire design.

rules.source: 仓库防火安全管理规则
rules.title: Warehouse ventilation
rules.text: Warehouses storing volatile combustibles shall have adequate ventilation; mechanical ventilation systems shall be inspected at least quarterly.

rules.title: Owner responsibility for sub-tenants
rules.text: Building owners renting space to sub-tenants remain responsible for fire compartment integrity and shared facility maintenance.

rules.title: Fire facility upgrade
rules.text: Existing buildings undergoing major refurbishment shall upgrade fire facilities to current code where reasonably practicable.

rules.title: Tenant fire training
rules.text: Tenants of high-rise buildings shall receive fire safety training annually, including evacuation routes and hydrant operation.

rules.title: Production area smoking
rules.text: Smoking is prohibited in production workshops, warehouses, and adjacent fire-isolation zones; designated areas shall be at least 10 m away.

rules.title: Lithium battery storage
rules.text: Lithium battery storage shall use dedicated rooms with thermal sensors, separation walls, and capacity limits; mixing with combustible materials is prohibited.

rules.title: Conveyor belt cleaning
rules.text: Conveyor belts handling combustible dust shall be cleaned daily; accumulated dust thicker than 5 mm requires immediate cleanup.

rules.title: Mobile equipment fueling
rules.text: Diesel and LPG fueling of forklifts and on-site vehicles shall be performed at designated outdoor stations with portable extinguisher within 5 m.

rules.title: Painting booth interlock
rules.text: Spray paint booths shall interlock spray-gun trigger with exhaust ventilation; painting with disabled or bypassed interlocks is prohibited.

rules.title: Hot oil cooking limit
rules.text: Cafeteria hot-oil cookers shall not be left unattended; on-site fire blanket and Class K extinguisher shall be in reach.

rules.title: Equipment grounding test
rules.text: Anti-static grounding for equipment handling flammable liquids shall be tested at least every six months with results recorded.

rules.title: Hot work isolation distance
rules.text: Hot work shall maintain at least 10 m horizontal isolation from combustible storage; combustibles within range shall be removed or covered.

rules.title: Worker PPE requirement
rules.text: Production workers in fire-prone or hot-work areas shall wear flame-resistant PPE; cotton work clothes are insufficient for welding tasks.

rules.title: Compressor room ventilation
rules.text: Air compressor and gas compressor rooms shall have continuous ventilation; oil mist accumulation shall be cleaned at least monthly.

rules.title: Outdoor lighting
rules.text: Outdoor temporary lighting on construction sites shall be weatherproof, with cables raised at least 2.5 m above pedestrian walkways.

rules.title: Earth-leakage detector
rules.text: Each terminal switch box shall have a residual-current device with rated trip current ≤ 30 mA and trip time ≤ 0.1 s.

rules.title: Tower crane power supply
rules.text: Tower crane power supply shall use a dedicated cable and isolation switch; sharing with other site loads is prohibited.

rules.title: Wood/scaffold fire risk
rules.text: Combustible scaffolding boards and wood pallets shall be stored at least 5 m from hot-work areas and covered with fire-retardant tarpaulins.

rules.title: Mezzanine residential ban
rules.text: Building mezzanine living quarters above production lines is prohibited and constitutes a major hazard regardless of partition material.

rules.title: Powder handling control
rules.text: Workshops handling combustible powder shall have explosion-proof equipment, anti-static grounding, and dust suppression; absence is a major hazard.

rules.title: Confined space hot work
rules.text: Hot work in confined spaces without approved permit, ventilation, and on-site monitoring is a major hazard.

rules.title: Theater backstage egress
rules.text: Theater backstage and stage areas shall have direct evacuation routes independent of audience exits; both shall be free of stored props.

rules.title: Mall public area decoration
rules.text: Shopping malls shall use Class A or B1 decoration materials in public corridors and atriums; flammable holiday decorations require fire safety review.

rules.title: Gas pipeline maintenance
rules.text: Commercial kitchen gas pipelines shall be inspected at least annually for corrosion and joint leakage; gas leak alarms required for piped LPG/natural gas.

rules.title: Cooker shut-off
rules.text: Gas valves of cooking equipment shall be closed at end of business; pilot flame-only operation overnight is not permitted.

rules.source: 城镇燃气管理条例 (国务院令)
rules.title: User gas pipeline maintenance
rules.text: Gas users shall not modify, conceal, or block gas pipelines and gas meters; modifications shall be conducted by qualified suppliers.

rules.source: 城镇燃气管理条例 (国务院令)
rules.title: LPG cylinder filling
rules.text: LPG cylinders shall only be filled at licensed stations; private decanting between cylinders is prohibited and constitutes a major hazard.

rules.title: Gas-room ventilation
rules.text: Indoor gas equipment rooms shall have natural ventilation openings at high and low levels; mechanical ventilation shall use explosion-proof fans.

rules.title: Gas leak alarm
rules.text: Locations using piped fuel gas indoors shall install combustible-gas leak detectors with audible alarm and shutoff valve linkage.

rules.source: GB 50966-2014 / 电动汽车充电基础设施
rules.title: EV charging station fire compartment
rules.text: Indoor EV charging stations shall be located in dedicated fire compartments with sprinklers and combustible-gas detectors.

rules.source: GB 50966-2014 / 电动汽车充电基础设施
rules.title: Charger maintenance
rules.text: EV chargers shall be inspected quarterly for cable abrasion, plug melting, and ventilation; faulty units shall be removed from service.

rules.source: 医疗机构消防安全管理
rules.title: Hospital escape assistance
rules.text: Hospitals shall keep evacuation corridors at least 2.4 m wide for stretcher passage; storing trolleys, equipment, or chairs in the corridor is prohibited.

rules.source: 医疗机构消防安全管理
rules.title: Oxygen storage
rules.text: Hospital oxygen cylinder rooms shall be separated from heat sources, with cylinders chained vertically and separated from full and empty stock.

rules.source: 医疗机构消防安全管理
rules.title: Operating-room emergency
rules.text: Operating rooms shall have emergency power within 15 seconds of mains failure and clearly marked manual disconnection of medical-gas valves.

rules.source: 中小学幼儿园消防安全管理
rules.title: Childcare evacuation drill
rules.text: Kindergartens and primary schools shall conduct fire evacuation drills at least once per term, including escape routes from upper floors.

rules.source: 中小学幼儿园消防安全管理
rules.title: Lab chemical storage
rules.text: School laboratory chemicals shall be stored by category in dedicated cabinets; flammables and oxidizers shall not share the same cabinet.

rules.source: 中小学幼儿园消防安全管理
rules.title: Classroom power outlet limit
rules.text: Classrooms shall not chain multiple power strips; high-power equipment such as electric kettles shall not be plugged into classroom outlets.

rules.source: 宾馆酒店消防安全管理
rules.title: Guest evacuation map
rules.text: Hotel guest rooms shall have an evacuation map showing the exit route to the nearest stairwell on the back of the door.

rules.source: 宾馆酒店消防安全管理
rules.title: Hotel front-desk emergency duty
rules.text: Hotels shall maintain 24-hour front-desk emergency duty with at least one staff trained in fire suppression and evacuation.

rules.source: 数据中心机房消防安全 (GB 50174)
rules.title: Server-room fire suppression
rules.text: Data centers and primary server rooms shall use approved gas suppression systems (FM-200, IG541, or equivalent), not water sprinklers.

rules.source: 数据中心机房消防安全 (GB 50174)
rules.title: Server-room access control
rules.text: Server room access shall be restricted; combustible packaging materials inside the room are prohibited.

rules.source: 数据中心机房消防安全 (GB 50174)
rules.title: UPS battery room ventilation
rules.text: UPS battery rooms shall have continuous ventilation to disperse hydrogen; battery storage above safe SOC limits is prohibited.

rules.title: Site temp dorm fire requirement
rules.text: On-site temporary dormitories shall be constructed of non-combustible or B1 panels with separation from material storage and welding zones.

rules.title: Site fire facility provisioning
rules.text: Construction sites shall provide adequate portable extinguishers, sand buckets, and water tanks based on construction scale; missing facilities are non-compliant.

rules.title: Welder qualification
rules.text: Welding and cutting work on sites shall be performed by personnel holding valid special-operation certificates; uncertified hot work is prohibited.

rules.title: Charging socket overcurrent
rules.text: E-bike charging sockets shall have individual overcurrent and short-circuit protection that automatically disconnects on fault.

rules.title: Charging time control
rules.text: E-bike charging stations shall provide automatic time-limit and overcharge protection; uncontrolled overnight charging is treated as a hazard.

rules.title: Building owner record
rules.text: Building owners shall keep an up-to-date fire safety record including layout, facility status, and inspection log accessible to fire authorities.

rules.title: Government supervision
rules.text: Public security and emergency authorities are authorized to conduct unannounced inspections of fire safety; obstruction is subject to penalty.
